Class Course

java.lang.Object
academic.Course
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Course extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a university course with eligibility rules, instructors, students, and scheduled lessons.
See Also:

      public boolean isEligible(Student student)
      Checks whether a student matches the course major and year requirements.

      student - the student being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the student may register for this course
